name: Bellingham Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bellingham Park in Mooresville, NC! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Cornelius Park
description: Cornelius Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mooresville, NC. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Ebenezer School
description: Come play pickleball at Ebenezer School in Statesville, NC! There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Iredell County Recreation Center
description:
Iredell County Recreation Center is located near Barium Springs and offers a Fitness Center with... 
State of the Art Exercise Equipment  
Gymnasium (Basketball, Volleyball and Pickleball)
Locker Rooms
Indoor Track
Group Exercise
Personal Training
Youth Programs
 Adult Programs
Community Programs & Events 
Seasonal Pool
fees: Fee required — Membership or a $5 drop in fee

name: Lake Norman Pickleball Club
description: Lake Norman Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Mooresville, NC. There are 6 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, water, youth programming, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.
fees: Members only — $24/hr split between a max of 6 players (member rate)

name: Lake Norman Racquet & Social Club
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Norman Racquet & Social Club in Mooresville, NC! There are 6 outdoor clay and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Lowe's YMCA
description: Lowe's YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Mooresville, NC. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and lights.

name: Mooresville War Memorial Center
description: Mooresville War Memorial Center is a place to play pickleball in Mooresville, NC. There are 12 clay courts. 8 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Selma Burke Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Selma Burke Recreation Center in Mooresville, NC! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Statesville Family YMCA
description: Statesville Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Statesville, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Statesville Fitness and Rec.
description: Statesville Fitness and Rec. is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Statesville, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Talbert Recreation Center
description: Talbert Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Mooresville, NC. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Troutman ESC Park
description: Troutman ESC Park is a place to play pickleball in Troutman, NC. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. Reservations are available. The courts are free.

name: Trump National Golf Club
description: Trump National Golf Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mooresville, NC. There are 2 outdoor clay and hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.
